infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to unlock OpenCode and access your sessions securely.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: OpenCode uses speech recognition so you can dictate prompts to your AI coding agent hands-free.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OpenCode uses the microphone to capture your voice when using speech-to-text input.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OpenCode can attach images from your photo library to messages to your AI coding agent.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenCode can capture images with your camera and attach them to messages to your AI coding agent.

plugins.photosPermission: OpenCode can attach images from your photo library to messages to your AI coding agent.
plugins.cameraPermission: OpenCode can capture images with your camera and attach them to messages to your AI coding agent.

plugins.microphonePermission: OpenCode uses the microphone to capture your voice when using speech-to-text input.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: OpenCode uses speech recognition so you can dictate prompts to your AI coding agent hands-free.
